text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I might've lost, but that's not gonna keep me
down!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They say that condors take one deep plunge
before soaring high...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Which means that loss was the springboard that'll
send me soaring!
choice_data_list: Let's put that loss behind us!
